info.title: Orca Scan REST API
info.description:
OpenAPI extracted from the Orca Scan REST API guide
Source: https://orcascan.com/guides/rest-api-f09a21c3

Partial.name: partial
Partial.description: If true, only provided fields are updated (others remain unchanged)

Row.description: Dynamic row object. Keys map to your sheet's fields and are defined by the sheet schema. Use GET /sheets/{sheetId}/fields) to discover available fields and types. If a field is configured as an image or attachment, you may send a URL or a base64 string (data URI or raw base64); responses will return URLs.

format.description: field type label, e.g. text, drop-down list, gps location

put.summary: Removes all rows from a sheet
put.description: Removes all rows from a sheet

post.description: Add row(s) (adds or updates if exists)
